gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/363)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/363)
text: قُلْتُ لَهُ إِنَّا رُوِّينَا فِي الْحَدِيثِ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ يَسْتَنْجِي وَ خَاتَمُهُ فِي إِصْبَعِهِ وَ كَذَلِكَ كَانَ يَفْعَلُ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ كَانَ نَقْشُ خَاتَمِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ قَالَ صَدَقُوا قُلْتُ فَيَنْبَغِي لَنَا أَنْ نَفْعَلَ قَالَ إِنَّ أُولَئِكَ كَانُوا يَتَخَتَّمُونَ فِي الْيَدِ الْيُمْنَى وَ إِنَّكُمْ أَنْتُمْ تَتَخَتَّمُونَ فِي الْيُسْرَى

قَالَ فَسَكَتَ فَقَالَ أَ تَدْرِي مَا كَانَ نَقْشُ خَاتَمِ آدَمَ ( عليه السلام ) فَقُلْتُ لَا فَقَالَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَ كَانَ نَقْشُ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَ خَاتَمِ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) اللَّهُ الْمَلِكُ وَ خَاتَمِ الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) الْعِزَّةُ لِلَّهِ وَ خَاتَمِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ اللَّهَ بَالِغُ أَمْرِهِ وَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) خَاتَمُ أَبِيهِ وَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ الْأَكْبَرُ خَاتَمُ جَدِّهِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ خَاتَمُ جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) اللَّهُ وَلِيِّي وَ عِصْمَتِي مِنْ خَلْقِهِ وَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ الْأَوَّلُ ( عليه السلام ) حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ وَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ الثَّانِي مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
وَ قَالَ الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ وَ مَدَّ يَدَهُ إِلَيَّ وَ قَالَ خَاتَمِي خَاتَمُ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) أَيْضاً .

en.hubeali: Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Husayn Bin Khalid,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 2<sup>nd</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘We are reporting in the Hadeeth that Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> was cleaning himself<sup>saww</sup> and his<sup>saww</sup> ring was in his<sup>saww</sup> finger, and similar to that is what Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> did, and the engraving of a ring of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> was – “Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup> Allah<sup>azwj</sup>”’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They spoke the truth’. I said, ‘So would it befit us that we do it’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They (people) are wearing rings in the right hand and you all are wearing rings in the left hand’.

He (the narrator) said, ‘So I was silent, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do you know what was the engraving in the ring of Adam<sup>as</sup>?’ So I said, ‘No’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no god except for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> is Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>’, and the engraving in the ring of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> was “Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>”; and the ring of Amir Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> was “Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the King”; and the ring of Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> was “The Honour is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>”, and the ring of Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> was “Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Fulfils His<sup>azwj</sup> Command”, and Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> wore the ring of his<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup>, and Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> the great wore the ring of his<sup>asws</sup> grandfather Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, and the ring of Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> was “Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is my<sup>asws</sup> Guardian and Protects me<sup>asws</sup> from His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures; and Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 1<sup>st</sup> “Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is Sufficient”; and Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 2<sup>nd</sup> “Whatever Allah<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires, there is no Strength except with Allah<sup>azwj</sup>”’.

And Al-Husayn Bin Khalid (the narrator) said, ‘And he<sup>asws</sup> extended his<sup>asws</sup> hand towards me and said: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> ring is the ring of my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> as well’.
en.sarwar: 8. Sahl ibn Ziyad Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Husayn ibn Khalid who has said the following: “I once said to abu al-Hassan, al-Thaniy, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘We narrate in Hadith that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, after using the rest room performed cleansing while wearing his ring on his finger and so also did ’Amir al-Mu’minin. The engraving on the ring of the Messenger of Allah said, ‘Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah’. He (the Imam) said, ‘They have spoken the truth.’ I then asked, ‘Is it proper for us to do so?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘They wore the ring on their right hand and you wear it on your left hand.’ I then remained quiet and he (the Imam) asked, ‘Do you know what the engraving on the ring of Adam, ‘Alayhi al-Salam was?’ I replied, ‘No, I do not know.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It was ‘No one deserves worship except Allah and Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.’ The engraving on the ring of the last and seal of the prophets said, ‘Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah’. The engraving on the ring of ’Amir al-Mu’minin said, ‘Allah is the owner. ’ On the ring of al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, it said, ‘All glory belongs to Allah.’ On the ring of al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, it said, ‘Allah achieves His goals.’ On the ring of Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, it was like the ring of his father. On the ring of abu Ja‘far, the great, it was like the ring of his grandfather. On the ring of Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, it said, ‘Allah is my Guardian and protector from His creatures. ’ On the ring of abu al- Hassan, al-Awwal, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, it said, ‘Allah is sufficient for me.’ On the ring of abu al-Hassan, al-Thaniy, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, it said, ‘It is all what Allah wants, there is no power except Allah.’ Al- Husayn ibn Khalid has said that he (the Imam) then extended his hand to me and said, ‘The engraving on my ring is like the engraving on the ring of my father, ‘Alayhi al-Salam.’” (Abu al-Hassan, al- Thaniy, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, it seems had two rings. One was his own ring with engraving that said, ‘It is all what Allah wants, there is no power except Allah’ and his other ring was the ring of his father).
